LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL R. JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. THE MOTION IS PROCEDURALLY DEFECTIVE FOR IMPROPER SERVICE AND FOR FAILING TO ATTACH AN INTERLINEATED PROPOSED AMENDMENT AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 471.5. THE MOTION ALSO IS WITHOUT MERIT UNDER SIMMONS VS. ALLSTATE INS. CO. (2001) 92 CAL. APP. 4TH, 1068. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Michael Johnson's Motion to vacate judgment. Appearances: Erik P. Weiss, Esq., of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, (415) 788-1900, appearing for Defendant, Korbin Family Law, (Counsel appearing to get Order signed.)There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The Motion is denied. Improper, untimely, motion for reconsideration. CCP section 1008. Order signed in Open Court.302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Continued To Mar-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KORBIN FAMILY LAW'S Motion for Attorney's Fees and Costs. Appearances: Erik Weiss, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradly & Feeney; 788-1900, representing defendant and moving party; Michael R. Johnson, Defendant in Pro Per, appearing and opposing Party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED, NO OPPOSTION FILED. Order signed in Open Court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL R. JOHNSON'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint.
APPEARANCES: Michael R. Johnson, 368-5587 pltf & moving party in propria persona; Erik P. Weiss, Esq. of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney 788-1900 for deft & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. The motion is procedurally defective for improper service and for failing to attach an interlineated proposed amendment as required by CCP Section 471.5. The motion also is without merit under Simmons vs. Allstate Ins. Co. (2001) 92 Cal. App. 4th, 1068. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Johnson (368.5587) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona
Erik Weiss of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (788.1900) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT KORBIN FAMILY LAW'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Johnson (368.5587) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona
Erik Weiss of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (788.1900) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT is denied without prejudice, untimely notice. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
